title: OptimizePack
description: This ModPack Optimize Your Game. Better For PvP
body:
# ⚡ About the Modpack

This modpack is designed to optimize Minecraft performance while adding a few useful utility features to improve the overall gameplay experience. It focuses on increasing FPS, reducing lag, and making the game run smoother on both low-end and high-end systems.

Unlike heavy modpacks, this one keeps the vanilla feel of Minecraft while improving performance and adding quality-of-life improvements.

## 🚀 Features

> - Performance Optimization – Boosts FPS and improves game stability.
> - Lag Reduction – Optimized rendering and memory usage.
> - Vanilla-Friendly – Keeps the core Minecraft experience unchanged.
> - Utility Mods – Adds helpful tools and quality-of-life features.
> - Lightweight – Fast loading times and low resource usage.

## 🎮 Perfect For

> - Players with low-end PCs who want better FPS
> - Players who want smoother Minecraft without changing gameplay
> -  Servers that need better performance and stability

## 📦 Modpack Type

> Optimization + Utility

## ⭐ Why Use This Modpack?

If you want better performance, smoother gameplay, and useful utilities while keeping Minecraft close to vanilla, this modpack is a great choice.
